message:
chore: remove dead asupersync runtime bootstrap blocks from 8 test modules

Removed redundant #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] tokio::runtime
bootstrap blocks from run_async_test helpers in ingest,
recorder_lexical_ingest, recording, session_correlation, simulation,
tantivy_ingest, tantivy_reindex, undo, and watchdog test modules.

These blocks manually created a tokio current-thread runtime and entered
its context before calling RuntimeBuilder, but the runtime_compat layer
already handles runtime selection internally. The manual bootstrap was
left over from the initial asupersync migration and is now dead code
since RuntimeBuilder::current_thread().build() does the right thing for
both the tokio and asupersync feature paths.

Also includes: minor formatting fix in replay_post_incident.rs
(assert_eq string alignment) and reformatted saturating_add chain in
termwiz windows.rs console coordinate clamping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
